user.title: Argon ONE Case Setup
user.description: Select your Argon ONE case type. Make sure I2C is enabled before proceeding.

error.i2c_not_available: I2C bus not available. Please enable I2C and restart.
error.i2c_device_not_found: Argon ONE case not detected on I2C bus. Check connection.

init.title: Argon ONE Options
init.description: Select a temperature sensor to enable fan preset modes (Silent, Default, Performance). Leave empty to disable presets.
